methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $2M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 19 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Roboneers is a Growth-stage company in the Defense & Security sector founded by Anton and Oleksiy Skrypnyk. The company has raised $2M+ to date. The comparable universe includes 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers, with notable private comparables including Anduril Industries, Helsing, Shield AI, Saronic, and Quantum-Systems.

The valuation analysis relies primarily on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 1.2x step-up multiplier to the $2M total raised as a proxy baseline, yielding an implied value of $2.4M. Peer-median analysis is not applicable due to insufficient narrow-stage comparables within Defense & Security; while 19 same-sector peers exist, none meet the thresholds for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation-tier classification. A broader peer median would introduce material bias and was therefore excluded from triangulation.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $2.0M (low) to $2.76M (high), with a median point of $2.4M. This narrow range reflects the single applicable method and the early-stage nature of the dataset. Key uncertainties include the absence of comparable growth-stage Defense & Security transactions to validate stage-step multiples and limited visibility into Roboneers' revenue, customer traction, or technology differentiation relative to the named peer set. Additional diligence on near-term funding activity and customer momentum would substantively refine this estimate.
